title: medicago orbicularis var. marginata
intro: Medicago orbicularis var. marginata, also known as spotted medick, is a perennial legume native to Europe and Western Asia. It is a type of plant in the pea family Fabaceae, known for its medicinal properties and health benefits. The plant is traditionally used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin problems, due to its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Medicago orbicularis var. marginata can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal benefits, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
